title: Bell craft
body:
**This mod makes bell craftable in your minecraft**

**Features**

- Balanced Recipe: Integrates perfectly into vanilla survival.

- Lightweight: No performance impact; works with all modpacks.

**Why use this mod?**

Bells are essential for alarms, redstone systems, and base decoration, but their rarity in villages can be frustrating. This mod removes the randomness, giving you full control so you can focus on building instead of searching.
